I mean, that's where I would go, right?
When you go there, like to know, like what all you could use it for.
Yeah.
You know, is it going to replace what I'm using or can I add it on?
Or, you know, those are the questions that I think people have the most often if they're looking at a tool.
So, okay.
Will do.
Thank you, Carrie.
Nice chatting with you.
Congratulations again.
Thank you.
All right.
Talk soon.
Bye.
Okay.
Bye-bye.

default_summary.markdown_formatted:
## Meeting Purpose

[Review content performance, plan for AI visibility, and align on strategy.](https://fathom.video/share/gTcMaGFxYrpo7yvoHMR6Q4gVPqZkSxiq?tab=summary&timestamp=329.0)

## Key Takeaways

  - [**AI Visibility is a top priority,** driven by 4 of the last 6 conversions originating from ChatGPT.](https://fathom.video/share/gTcMaGFxYrpo7yvoHMR6Q4gVPqZkSxiq?tab=summary&timestamp=2443.0)
  - [**Use case pages are the highest-converting asset,** prompting a strategy shift to focus on optimizing and creating new ones.](https://fathom.video/share/gTcMaGFxYrpo7yvoHMR6Q4gVPqZkSxiq?tab=summary&timestamp=1126.0)
  - [**ChatGPT's August 2023 data cutoff** explains slow traction; the immediate fix is adding the brand name to article TLDRs to improve AI parsing.](https://fathom.video/share/gTcMaGFxYrpo7yvoHMR6Q4gVPqZkSxiq?tab=summary&timestamp=404.0)
  - [**Jessica Yip's 3-month maternity leave** starts next month, requiring a smooth transition plan.](https://fathom.video/share/gTcMaGFxYrpo7yvoHMR6Q4gVPqZkSxiq?tab=summary&timestamp=227.0)

## Topics

### Performance & Strategy Shift

  - [**GA4 Conversion Data:**](https://fathom.video/share/gTcMaGFxYrpo7yvoHMR6Q4gVPqZkSxiq?tab=summary&timestamp=1429.0)
      - [**Use Case Pages:** The highest-converting asset.](https://fathom.video/share/gTcMaGFxYrpo7yvoHMR6Q4gVPqZkSxiq?tab=summary&timestamp=1126.0)
      - [**Blog:** Zero direct conversions in the last 30 days.](https://fathom.video/share/gTcMaGFxYrpo7yvoHMR6Q4gVPqZkSxiq?tab=summary&timestamp=1590.0)
      - [**AI-Driven Conversions:** 4 of the last 6 conversions originated from ChatGPT.](https://fathom.video/share/gTcMaGFxYrpo7yvoHMR6Q4gVPqZkSxiq?tab=summary&timestamp=2443.0)
  - [**Strategic Pivot:** Shift focus from blog posts to use case pages and AI visibility.](https://fathom.video/share/gTcMaGFxYrpo7yvoHMR6Q4gVPqZkSxiq?tab=summary&timestamp=2443.0)
  - [**GA4 Attribution:**](https://fathom.video/share/gTcMaGFxYrpo7yvoHMR6Q4gVPqZkSxiq?tab=summary&timestamp=1860.0)
      - [**Methodology:** Carrie Chowske used AI to analyze multi-visit user paths (via User ID) to attribute conversions to their true source, not just the last click.](https://fathom.video/share/gTcMaGFxYrpo7yvoHMR6Q4gVPqZkSxiq?tab=summary&timestamp=1884.0)
      - [**Result:** LLM traffic is the second-highest converting channel over the last 60 days.](https://fathom.video/share/gTcMaGFxYrpo7yvoHMR6Q4gVPqZkSxiq?tab=summary&timestamp=2162.0)
      - [**Action:** Carrie Chowske will document this analysis methodology for transparency.](https://fathom.video/share/gTcMaGFxYrpo7yvoHMR6Q4gVPqZkSxiq?tab=summary&timestamp=2235.0)

### AI Visibility & Content Gaps

  - [**Goal:** Create content that fills AI visibility gaps.](https://fathom.video/share/gTcMaGFxYrpo7yvoHMR6Q4gVPqZkSxiq?tab=summary&timestamp=780.0)
  - [**ChatGPT Data Lag:** The free version's training data cutoff (August 2023) explains why new content isn't being picked up quickly.](https://fathom.video/share/gTcMaGFxYrpo7yvoHMR6Q4gVPqZkSxiq?tab=summary&timestamp=440.0)
  - [**Immediate Fix:** Add the brand name to article TLDRs.](https://fathom.video/share/gTcMaGFxYrpo7yvoHMR6Q4gVPqZkSxiq?tab=summary&timestamp=404.0)
      - [**Rationale:** LLMs reportedly read only the first 50% of content, making early brand mention critical for AI parsing.](https://fathom.video/share/gTcMaGFxYrpo7yvoHMR6Q4gVPqZkSxiq?tab=summary&timestamp=404.0)
  - [**Content Gap Analysis:** Carrie Chowske is creating a spreadsheet to identify:](https://fathom.video/share/gTcMaGFxYrpo7yvoHMR6Q4gVPqZkSxiq?tab=summary&timestamp=591.0)
      - [**Optimization Opportunities:** Existing content not visible in AI.](https://fathom.video/share/gTcMaGFxYrpo7yvoHMR6Q4gVPqZkSxiq?tab=summary&timestamp=591.0)
      - [**Content Gaps:** Topics where competitors rank but Yourco does not.](https://fathom.video/share/gTcMaGFxYrpo7yvoHMR6Q4gVPqZkSxiq?tab=summary&timestamp=591.0)
      - [**Quick Wins:** Small tests (e.g., TLDR updates) to validate optimization tactics.](https://fathom.video/share/gTcMaGFxYrpo7yvoHMR6Q4gVPqZkSxiq?tab=summary&timestamp=619.0)
  - [**Chat Deck Platform:**](https://fathom.video/share/gTcMaGFxYrpo7yvoHMR6Q4gVPqZkSxiq?tab=summary&timestamp=649.0)
      - [**Challenge:** The platform mixes custom prompts with generic ones, making it hard to identify true content gaps.](https://fathom.video/share/gTcMaGFxYrpo7yvoHMR6Q4gVPqZkSxiq?tab=summary&timestamp=649.0)
      - [**Solution:** Carrie Chowske will tag prompts by content status (e.g., "covered," "gap") to enable filtering.](https://fathom.video/share/gTcMaGFxYrpo7yvoHMR6Q4gVPqZkSxiq?tab=summary&timestamp=789.0)

### Use Case Page Redesign

  - [**Rationale:** Optimize the highest-converting asset.](https://fathom.video/share/gTcMaGFxYrpo7yvoHMR6Q4gVPqZkSxiq?tab=summary&timestamp=1126.0)
  - [**Wireframes:** Carrie Chowske presented two redesign options.](https://fathom.video/share/gTcMaGFxYrpo7yvoHMR6Q4gVPqZkSxiq?tab=summary&timestamp=1184.0)
      - [**Key Feature:** Accordion-style content sections.](https://fathom.video/share/gTcMaGFxYrpo7yvoHMR6Q4gVPqZkSxiq?tab=summary&timestamp=1201.0)
      - [**Benefit:** Keeps long-form SEO content on the page without cluttering the user experience.](https://fathom.video/share/gTcMaGFxYrpo7yvoHMR6Q4gVPqZkSxiq?tab=summary&timestamp=1315.0)

### Production & Process

  - [**Article Production:**](https://fathom.video/share/gTcMaGFxYrpo7yvoHMR6Q4gVPqZkSxiq?tab=summary&timestamp=340.0)
      - [8 articles published last week.](https://fathom.video/share/gTcMaGFxYrpo7yvoHMR6Q4gVPqZkSxiq?tab=summary&timestamp=340.0)
      - [This week's articles are staged; Jessica Yip's feedback will be incorporated before publication.](https://fathom.video/share/gTcMaGFxYrpo7yvoHMR6Q4gVPqZkSxiq?tab=summary&timestamp=340.0)
  - [**Internal Linking:**](https://fathom.video/share/gTcMaGFxYrpo7yvoHMR6Q4gVPqZkSxiq?tab=summary&timestamp=1328.0)
      - [**Status:** \~50% complete.](https://fathom.video/share/gTcMaGFxYrpo7yvoHMR6Q4gVPqZkSxiq?tab=summary&timestamp=1328.0)
      - [**Challenge:** AI-generated content is weak at internal linking.](https://fathom.video/share/gTcMaGFxYrpo7yvoHMR6Q4gVPqZkSxiq?tab=summary&timestamp=1381.0)
      - [**Solution:** The "artifact" tool will serve as a QA checklist to enforce linking standards.](https://fathom.video/share/gTcMaGFxYrpo7yvoHMR6Q4gVPqZkSxiq?tab=summary&timestamp=1388.0)
  - [**Broken Links:** Carrie Chowske found and reported broken links via SEMrush; they will be fixed with this week's content push.](https://fathom.video/share/gTcMaGFxYrpo7yvoHMR6Q4gVPqZkSxiq?tab=summary&timestamp=1420.0)

## Next Steps

  - [**Carrie Chowske:**](https://fathom.video/share/gTcMaGFxYrpo7yvoHMR6Q4gVPqZkSxiq?tab=summary&timestamp=2419.0)
      - [Document the GA4 multi-touch attribution analysis methodology.](https://fathom.video/share/gTcMaGFxYrpo7yvoHMR6Q4gVPqZkSxiq?tab=summary&timestamp=2235.0)
      - [Deliver the content opportunity spreadsheet by EOW.](https://fathom.video/share/gTcMaGFxYrpo7yvoHMR6Q4gVPqZkSxiq?tab=summary&timestamp=591.0)
      - [Tag prompts in the Chat Deck platform to identify content gaps.](https://fathom.video/share/gTcMaGFxYrpo7yvoHMR6Q4gVPqZkSxiq?tab=summary&timestamp=789.0)
      - [Ensure production incorporates Jessica Yip's feedback on staged articles.](https://fathom.video/share/gTcMaGFxYrpo7yvoHMR6Q4gVPqZkSxiq?tab=summary&timestamp=340.0)
  - [**Jessica Yip:**](https://fathom.video/share/gTcMaGFxYrpo7yvoHMR6Q4gVPqZkSxiq?tab=summary&timestamp=2400.0)
      - [Implement CTA/image changes on use case pages by EOW.](https://fathom.video/share/gTcMaGFxYrpo7yvoHMR6Q4gVPqZkSxiq?tab=summary&timestamp=2400.0)

action_items.description: Notify GrowthX team re: Jessica's maternity leave next month (3 mos)
Ensure Yourco brand name in TLDR/intro of all articles
Send AI/SEO content opportunities spreadsheet to Jessica
Tag Chat Deck prompts: content coverage, type, competitor mentions, use cases
Send both use-case wireframe links to Jessica
Confirm internal linking QA w/ production; implement QA step
Update use-case page CTAs and images; go live by EOW
Send GA4 attribution analysis steps + report to Jessica
